Name: bFirstRun
Description: When you first start the game sets certain settings depending on the configuration of the PC.

Name: sCoreResources
Description: Core resources list, loaded first when launching any mod.

Name: sIntroVideos
Description: You can override list of videos for your module by specifying a relative path to module folder for them.

Name: bPauseWhenMinimized
Description: Pause game when window minimized, does not recommend for multiplayer, because disconnect from server due to timeout.

Name: iScreenshotFormat
Description: 0=JPG,1=PNG,2=BMP,3=TGA

Name: bHasTutorial
Description: Determines if Tutorial appears on the main menu.

Name: bHasSingleplayer
Description: Determines if New Game and Load Game appear on main menu.

Name: bHasMultiplayer
Description: Determines if Multiplayer appears on the main menu.

Name: bHasCustomBattle
Description: Determines if Custom Battle appears on the main menu.

Name: iNumHints
Description: Total number of hints visible on the secondary loading screen.

Name: bHasOneHanded
Description: Determines the visibility of the weapon proficiency inside the character menu, but the weapons and the ability to use them still exists in the game.

Name: bHasTwoHanded
Description: same

Name: bHasPolearms
Description: same

Name: bHasArchery
Description: same

Name: bHasCrossbows
Description: same

Name: bHasThrowing
Description: same

Name: bHasFirearms
Description: same

Name: bEnableAltF4
Description: alt + f4 closes the game.

Name: bEnableLogWindowBackground
Description: Background mesh for multiplayer log window.

Name: sModuleDownloadUrl
Description: When you try to connect to a server for which there is no module in the game, it offers to download it from this link.

Name: bUseCaseInsensitiveMeshSearches
Description: Determines if your module allows case insensitive references to mesh names i.e. sword_a and Sword_a being treated as the same reference.

Name: sStoragePath
Description: Path where WSE created files are stored (empty for default).

Name: bLuaDisableGameConstWarnings
Description: Mutes warnings during msfiles folder scanning for lua.

Name: bCheatMode
Description: In-game cheats, useful for mod development. Operations: is_cheat_mode_enabled, options_get_cheat_mode, options_set_cheat_mode.

Name: bEditMode
Description: Scene editor, some debug features. Be warned, this slows down the game. Operations: is_edit_mode_enabled, edit_mode_set_enabled.

Name: bMainMenuScene
Description: Add scene to your module main menu. https://forums.taleworlds.com/index.php?threads/warband-script-enhancer-2-v1-0-6-4.384882/page-18#post-9758258

Name: iAttributeLimit
Description: Limit for troop attributes.

Name: bAllowDuplicateMeshes
Description: Merges meshes with the same name.

Name: bLoadModuleIniOptions
Description: Loads Warband's options from module.ini.

Name: bLocalVariablesZeroInitialization
Description: set to TRUE to initialize all locals variables with zeros, FALSE will give better performance

Name: bHasMultiplayerCampaign
Description: Determines if Join a Campaign appears on the Multiplayer menu.
